description: Project initialized, upstream forked, frontier state ingested
Verified live frontier from upstream README and issue #140, extracted exact PR heads for #414/#505/#508, and added repro-sync plus TTT legality audit tooling
Added durable run control: pod-local watchdog, PR #414 smoke/full run specs, and 11_RUN_CONTROL state files for resumable execution.
Completed PR #414 operational smoke run on 1x H100 SXM: train/eval/artifact path worked end-to-end, but score was not promotion-worthy and is not publishable.
